economy: Welfare benefits should be eliminated because they involve government redistribution of wealth.
Private charities and voluntary aid should replace government welfare programs.
The government should provide a universal basic income to ensure a safety net for all citizens.
The government should balance its budget by reducing spending rather than increasing taxes.
Deficit spending is acceptable if it funds essential government programs.
The Federal Reserve should have more control over the economy to ensure financial stability.
Businesses should operate with minimal government regulation.
The government should provide subsidies to support struggling industries.
Consumers should be protected by strict government-imposed safety and labor regulations.
The government should have minimal involvement in all aspects of life, including healthcare, education, and economic regulations.
The government should have extensive powers to regulate industries and manage the economy to ensure fairness and stability.
The government should have the power to provide for the public good, including social services and public infrastructure.
society: Abortion should be legal and available to all individuals.
The government should restrict access to abortion to protect potential life.
Individuals should have the freedom to make their own choices regarding abortion, without the need for government regulations or restrictions.
Citizens should be required to serve in the military to instill discipline and patriotism.
The government should have the authority to draft citizens into the military in times of war.
National borders must be strictly protected, and illegal immigration must be completely eliminated to defend our cultural and national identity.
The government should establish a national religion to unite the country under shared moral values.
Religious beliefs should not influence government policies or laws.
Individuals should be free to express their religious beliefs in public spaces without government restrictions.
The government should impose strict regulations on gun ownership to ensure public safety.
Individuals have the right to own firearms for self-defense and personal protection.
The government should be allowed to confiscate firearms from individuals who are deemed dangerous or mentally unstable.
Marriage should only be between one man and one woman, as defined by traditional societal values.
The government should recognize and support all forms of marriage, including same-sex marriages, equally under the law.
Marriage should be a private matter, with no government involvement in the regulation of marital relationships.
Society should prioritize traditional moral values, and these values should be reflected in laws and government policies.
Individuals should be free to choose their own values and way of life without interference from the government.
The government should protect and promote traditional family structures as the foundation of society.
Mothers can prioritize pursuing a career outside the home over maintaining the household and raising children.
Parents should have the freedom to raise their children according to their own values, without government interference.
Divorce should be discouraged, as it weakens the traditional family structure and contributes to moral decline in society.
Citizens should be legally required to show patriotism, such as standing for the national anthem or pledging allegiance.
Citizens do not have to respect the national flag and anthem.
Immigration weakens national identity and should be strictly limited to preserve our cultural heritage and security.
